required_skills: End-to-End Product Design from Discovery through Delivery
User Research, Usability Testing, and Insight Synthesis
Wireframing, Prototyping, and High-Fidelity Visual Design
Design Systems Ownership and Component Contribution
Cross-functional Collaboration with Product, Engineering, and Data Teams
Data-Informed Design Decision Making using Quantitative and Qualitative Signals
Accessibility Standards and Inclusive Design Practices (WCAG 2.1)
Stakeholder Alignment and Design Critique Facilitation
preferred_skills: Experience owning design strategy for a full product area or domain
Proficiency in defining and tracking design KPIs and success metrics
Familiarity with front-end code (HTML, CSS, React) to collaborate closely with engineers
Workshop facilitation for design sprints and co-creation sessions
Mentorship and critique leadership for junior designers
Motion design and complex animation prototyping
Experience designing for AI, ML, or data-heavy product surfaces
Localization, internationalization, and multi-market design experience
responsibilities: Own the complete design process for one or more product areas — from generative user research and problem framing through prototyping, testing, and pixel-perfect delivery
Conduct and synthesize qualitative and quantitative user research to develop a nuanced understanding of user needs, behaviors, and pain points that directly shapes product strategy
Design multi-fidelity prototypes in Figma — from rapid concept sketches to polished interactive mockups — used for stakeholder alignment, usability testing, and developer handoff
Collaborate with product managers during discovery phases to define problem statements, map opportunity spaces, and align on measurable design success criteria
Facilitate structured design critiques, cross-functional design reviews, and stakeholder presentations to build shared understanding and drive timely design decisions
Contribute to and help govern the product design system, ensuring new patterns are well-documented, scalable, and adopted consistently by the broader design team
Partner with data analysts and growth teams to interpret funnel metrics, session recordings, and A/B test results, feeding quantitative signals back into iterative design improvements
Conduct thorough design QA during and after engineering implementation to ensure shipped experiences faithfully reflect the intended design and interaction specifications
Advocate for user-centered and accessible design across the organization, embedding WCAG 2.1 compliance and inclusive design practices into every stage of the design process
Mentor junior and mid-level designers through structured feedback, portfolio reviews, and pairing sessions that elevate overall design craft and team output quality
